core_payload.content:
# Agent Async Assignment

## 1. Role
N1Hub will treat asynchronous assignment as a first-class work object that can begin from issues, comments, tasks, assistant actions, mobile controls, or operator surfaces and then continue independently until it returns a bounded artifact or a clarification request.

## 2. Durable Assignment Contract
- stable assignment handles that survive client switches and daemon restarts
- visible assignment origin, owner, due window, and lane selection
- artifact return tied to the same assignment chain
- clarification loops that route back to the originating surface
- status projection across web, terminal, mobile, and daemon views

## 3. Runtime Consequence
Assignment-aware routing will let the control plane, wallet, and daemon layer choose the right execution lane for each job instead of treating all background work as interchangeable. The same assignment will remain legible from request to artifact return even when multiple surfaces and agents participate.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Agent Async Assignment supports To Dig Deep by letting deep work continue autonomously without losing origin, ownership, routing discipline, or reviewability.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Agent Async Assignment defines the future durable assignment object for N1Hub: stable handles, cross-client continuation, assignment-aware routing, artifact return, status projection, and review-safe clarification loops across assistant, issue, mobile, terminal, and daemon surfaces.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
